name: Camelot Cadillac Limo Svc
recent_news: No M&A or growth news identified; appears to be a small Cliffside Park-based livery operation, not a school-bus contractor. Unrelated Camelot Specialty Limos (Lindenhurst, NY) is a separate luxury-limo operator.
fit_notes: Not a fit. 3-employee livery/cadillac limo service; no evidence of school-bus or SPED fleet operations. Outside Summit's tuck-in profile.

name: Carey Limo Celik
recent_news: No M&A or growth news identified. Appears to be a single-operator Hackensack livery service unaffiliated with national Carey International chauffeured network.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Micro livery operation with no demonstrated school district contracts or yellow-bus fleet. Outside Summit acquisition profile.

name: Citywide Transportation Corp
recent_news: No M&A or growth news identified. Paramus residential-address listing; no district contract evidence in NJ DOE 2022-23 contractor list search results.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Micro Paramus operation; no school-bus fleet or contract footprint identified.

name: EZ Limos
recent_news: No M&A or growth news identified. Unrelated 'EZ Ride' is a non-profit NJ community/ADA shuttle operator. EZ Limos is a separate small Wallington livery service.
fit_notes: Not a fit. 3-employee livery; no yellow-bus or SPED contract operations identified. Outside Summit acquisition criteria.

name: Grace Express Limousine Inc
recent_news: No M&A or growth news identified. Distinct from Grace Limousine (NH) and other 'Grace' branded limo operators. Appears to be a small Ridgefield, NJ Korean-American owned livery service.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Micro livery operation; no school district contract or yellow-bus fleet evidence. Outside Summit tuck-in profile.
